acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The checker validates the checked-in product QUIC fixture and runs by default.
The checker rejects obsolete flat product QUIC fields.
The checker rejects unsupported downstream claims unless a matching evidence artifact kind exists.
The checker is wired into just check.
The cross-device runbook documents how to validate a real receiver artifact.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Artifact-schema checker only; no live product QUIC or cross-device validation is required or claimed for this node.
